title: PM Approval Task Review Drillthrough
objective: Add frontend-only task-review drillthrough from the PM approval detail screen into existing promoted PM tracer, schedule, drivers, and variance routes while preserving scoped decision-history context, return-path conventions, and the existing mutation guardrails.
orchestration_inputs: PM Lane 012 remains the deployment gate for hosted mutation-seam parity and live PM proof.

Read-only scout 019e2c98-9994-76a3-9f30-239c0fc65747 confirmed the smallest task-review slice is to reuse existing approval callbacks and add Related Task Actions before the apparatus/history/decision cards.
Coordinator execution kept write ownership local to the PM approval frontend and focused approval-context smoke while using the scout as the parallel orchestration lane.
constrained_outputs: TaskReview accepts the same onTraceTask, onViewSchedule, onViewDrivers, and onViewVariance callbacks already used by snapshot and escalation flows.
Task review renders a Related Task Actions card with Trace Task, Open Schedule, Open Drivers, and Open Variance controls.
Task-review drillthrough preserves existing return-path conventions through buildPmReturnContext.

Focused Playwright proof adds a task-review deep link with scoped decision-history fixture data, asserts the scoped read, asserts the compact history context, verifies all task action controls, and proves tracer handoff plus return link.
Existing escalation and snapshot approval-context proofs remain intact.
validation_steps: CI=1 corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.approval-context.smoke.spec.ts
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-016 is frontend-only and does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, live data mutation, auth widening, ingress widening, schedule mutation, assignment mutation, Vercel promotion, or Render deployment action.
